evals.prompt: Show me the top consumers of Actions minutes and Actions artifact storage for the singapore-press-holdings enterprise for the current month (March 2026).
evals.expected_output: A ranked table of top repositories by Actions minutes consumed and a separate ranked table for artifact storage (GB-day), plus a summary of total spend.

evals.prompt: Pull a billing report for singapore-press-holdings from March 1 to March 5 2026. What are the top 10 repos burning the most Actions minutes, and which runner types (Linux/macOS/Windows) are they using?
evals.expected_output: Top 10 repos by Actions minutes with breakdown by runner type (Linux, macOS, Windows), using the detailed billing report.

evals.prompt: For singapore-press-holdings, give me a full cost breakdown by product for the first week of March 2026 (March 1–7). How much are we spending on Actions vs Copilot vs GHAS?
evals.expected_output: Total spend per product (actions, copilot, ghas, packages, git_lfs) with dollar amounts and percentages of total.
